title: CreateDeck
description: Introducing Fox's CreateDeck Modpack – designed for quick and casual Minecraft sessions. Play with ease on a controller or take the game on the go. Ideal for fixing machines in the car or gaming at a friend's place. Simplify your Minecraft experience with
body:
Welcome to Fox's Create Modpack – a tailored Minecraft experience designed for those who prefer playing with a controller or while on the go, just like me (:

In this pack, the possibilities are boundless. You can construct an elaborate factory, fueled by your imagination and powered at full steam. Alternatively, embark on a thrilling journey aboard a personally crafted train, transporting both you and your myriad of items to exciting destinations.

Key features of this Modpack include:

- Create Mod and its Addons: Explore a plethora of possibilities and unleash your creativity with the versatile Create mod and its numerous addons.

-Controller Mods: Enjoy a gaming experience by using the incorporated controller mods, allowing you to play with your favorite controllers effortlessly.

- Optimization Mods: Elevate your gaming experience with a selection of optimization mods that enhance  performance.

If you notice any performance issues then use the command  /flywheel backend batching this will fix your fps.

For more information or to connect with me, feel free to reach out on Discord at iam.fox I'm excited to receive your messages and share the immersive world of Minecraft with you!
